zh.lifeSummary: Joan de Saxonhurst是John de Saxonhurst的女兒，於大約1226年出生在英國多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉。她於1255年7月24日與Sir Henry de Berham I在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1265年在英國英格蘭多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan de Saxonhurst是John de Saxonhurst的女儿，于大约1226年出生在英国多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉。她于1255年7月24日与Sir Henry de Berham I在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1265年在英国英格兰多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Joan de Saxonhurst was born about 1226, in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England as the daughter of John de Saxonhurst. She married Sir Henry de Berham I on 24 July 1255, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1265, in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan de Saxonhurst est née environ 1226, à Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, fille de John de Saxonhurst. Elle a épousé Sir Henry de Berham I le 24 juillet 1255, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1265, à Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

Lei sposato Sir Henry de Berham I il 24 luglio 1255, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England: イギリスドールセトメルコンベ レジス
ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Saxonhurstは約1226年にイギリスドールセトメルコンベ レジスでJohn de Saxonhurstの娘として生まれた。1255年7月24日にイギリスイギリスケントでSir Henry de Berham Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1265年にイギリスイギリスドールセトメルコンベ レジスで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Saxonhurst(은)는 대략 1226년 영국 도르세트 멜코브 레지스에서 John de Saxonhurst의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1255년 7월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Sir Henry de Berham I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 멜코브 레지스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan de Saxonhurst родилась около 1226 г. в местности мелкомб регис, дорсет, Англия. Её отца звали John de Saxonhurst. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry de Berham I 24 июля 1255 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1265 г. в местности мелкомб регис, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.
